## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and exchange of professional updates between Marcel Santilli and Scott Turkow.](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Marcel's new venture, fwd.digital, has rapidly grown to 20 clients and $2M ARR in 5 months, focusing on AI-powered content and go-to-market services](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Scott has transitioned to a sales role at a healthcare AI company, focusing on large, multi-year deals with health systems and payers](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Both are navigating challenges in scaling their respective businesses, including implementation complexities and fundraising considerations](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=227.0)

## Topics

### Marcel's New Venture: fwd.digital

  - [Started as AI workflow workshops, evolved into full-service offering](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=402.0)
  - [20 clients, $2M ARR, 70% margins in 5 months](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Bootstrapped, saved $400k, considering small seed round](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Services include content creation, go-to-market strategies, and AI workflow implementation](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Pricing model: Subscription-based work streams, moving to 12-month commitments](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=644.0)
  - [Clients range from seed-stage startups to enterprises like Reddit and Ramp](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Scott's Career Transition and Company Update

  - [Moved to sales role ("the dark side") in healthcare AI](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Company preparing for Series D funding round](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Shifted focus to 3-5 year, seven-figure deals with large health systems](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Identified "meaty middle" sweet spot: 2-8 hospital systems](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=808.0)
  - [Post-sales implementation is current challenge due to product complexity](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)

### Market and Fundraising Landscape

  - [Both noted active fundraising environment, but mixed experiences](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Scott's company in Series D process, seen as indicator of future direction](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Marcel considering small seed round, wary of dilution and timing](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)

### Go-to-Market Strategies

  - [Scott suggested targeting VC/PE portfolios for efficient scaling](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [Discussed Primary Ventures as potential connection (Jason, Cassie Young)](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Marcel exploring how to effectively sell into PE-owned brand portfolios](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=917.0)

### Scaling Challenges

  - [Marcel: Rapid growth from 2 to 20 clients in 3 months causing operational strain](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=970.0)
  - [Scott: Balancing large deals (70-hospital system) with manageable implementations](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=815.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Scott to introduce Marcel to Lauren, VP of Marketing at his company](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Marcel to follow up with Jason at Primary Ventures, potentially mentioning Cassie Young](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1070.0)
  - [Both to keep in touch for future collaboration and knowledge sharing opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/k4TwhMqhcut8WhgyTTy2JNc9KEWG77Fr?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
